html_excerpt:
A Tough Goodbye from Team Tattly

We started Tattly with the goal of creating high quality temporary tattoos that celebrate the art of real artists. We wanted to bring back the joyful magic of the temporary tattoos from your childhood and to keep self-expression just as fun as it was back then.

Thanks to you, we have achieved that goal for the last 15 years!

Tattly fans of all ages wore our tattoos to vacations, dance floors, birthday parties, concerts, weddings, classrooms, big moments, and on totally ordinary Tuesdays that suddenly felt more fun.

As we close this chapter and shut down Tattly operations on February 23rd, 2026, our hearts are full of gratitude—for every artist who trusted us with their work, and every one of you who wore our tattoos, swapped them, gifted them, made memories with them, or saved them for a rainy day.

We know you may have some questions for us. We’re still here for you at hi-tattly@tattly.com to answer them.

If you currently have an order placed, it will be honored.

If you’re part of our community of artists, you can reach out at creative@tattly.com and we will provide any further support directly.

We miss you already, thanks for everything and more!

Team Tattly
